title: gelseminum pandorea
intro: Gelseminum pandorea, also known as Gelsemium sempervirens, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. It is a member of the Apocynaceae family and is often used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include sedative, analgesic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Gelseminum pandorea include reducing anxiety and insomnia, relieving muscle and joint pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Gelseminum pandorea can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
